headline: Is Bio-Techne Corporation (TECH) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is TECH a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Bio-Techne Corporation on r/ValueInvesting by Dynaheir-be. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on TECH. Bio-Techne Corporation’s share was trading at $52.65 as of June 8th. TECH’s trailing and forward P/E were 74.27 and 25.51 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Bio-Techne […]
